items.title: As a product owner, I can prioritize backlog in one workspace
items.description: Enable prioritized view with business value and readiness indicators.

items.title: As a scrum master, I can compare sprint capacity versus estimates
items.description: Show total AI estimate, final estimate, and capacity delta.
acceptanceCriteria: Capacity panel updates in real time

items.title: As an engineer, I can see dependency risks before sprint commitment
items.description: Identify sequence blockers and mitigation suggestions.

items.title: As an architect, I can capture technical enablers and constraints
items.description: Generate architecture intent note for sprint stories.

items.title: As governance, I can export sprint risk register
items.description: Provide risk register with mitigation and ownership.
acceptanceCriteria: Risk export works in CSV and JSON
